interactions.summary: Really? Yes. So the United States went to Forbes and GM and said, we might need you to start making weapons with your factories. Yes. And they're happy doing this because the product margins are much greater for weapons than for cars. This is the Pentagon, so you can charge them as much as you want and they'll pay for it. Whereas you make cars, it's for the consumer market and they may not buy your cars, right? So, i...
